mapper.sql:
WITH -- 0. 해당 날짜의 순수 총 작업 건수 사전 집계 TOTAL_STATS AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY) AS TOT_WORK_CNT FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHDDAY LIKE #{fromDate} || '%' ),
-- 1. 기초 데이터 (날짜/센터/화주 기준) BASE_MAP AS ( SELECT W.WAHDKEY, W.PIHDKEY, W.WKTYPECD, CAST(COALESCE(SUBSTRING(W.WAHDNM FROM '([0-9]+)회차'), W.WARND) AS NUMERIC) AS RN FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD W WHERE WAHDDAY LIKE #{fromDate} || '%' AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PIHDKEY IS NOT NULL ),
-- 2. 통합 웨이브 명칭 (PIHDKEY 기준) PICK_NAMED AS ( SELECT PIHDKEY, CASE WHEN MAX(WKTYPECD) = 'PW' THEN 'Bulk Wave' WHEN MAX(WKTYPECD) = 'UW' THEN 'Single Wave' ELSE 'Wave ' || DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY MIN(RN), PIHDKEY) END AS INTEGRATED_WAVE FROM BASE_MAP GROUP BY PIHDKEY ),
-- 3. 주문 모수 집계 ORD_DATA AS ( SELECT B.PIHDKEY, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.OBHDKEY) AS RELEASE_ORD_CNT, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'DW' THEN OH.OBHDKEY END) AS DAS_ORD_CNT, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'RW' THEN OH.OBHDKEY END) AS ROB_ORD_CNT, SUM(OD.INITQTY) AS TOTAL_PCS, SUM(CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'DW' THEN OD.INITQTY ELSE 0 END) AS DAS_TARGET_PCS, SUM(CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'UW' THEN OD.INITQTY ELSE 0 END) AS SINGLE_TARGET_PCS, SUM(CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'RW' AND IC.ROBSORTERICYN = 'Y' THEN OD.INITQTY ELSE 0 END) AS ROB_TARGET_PCS, SUM(CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'RW' AND IC.ROBSORTERICYN = 'N' THEN OD.INITQTY ELSE 0 END) AS IRR_TARGET_PCS, SUM(OD.PAKQTY) AS TOTAL_PAK_PCS FROM BASE_MAP B INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON B.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY GROUP BY B.PIHDKEY ),
-- 4. DAS 및 로봇 실적 통합 PERF_IF AS ( SELECT B.PIHDKEY, SUM(CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'DW' THEN COALESCE(DAS.DAS_MID_QTY, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS DAS_MID, SUM(CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'DW' THEN COALESCE(DAS.DAS_SML_QTY, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS DAS_SML, SUM(CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'RW' THEN COALESCE(RI.QTY, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS ROB_IN, SUM(CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'RW' THEN COALESCE(RP.QTY, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS ROB_PAK, SUM(CASE WHEN B.WKTYPECD = 'RW' THEN COALESCE(RR.QTY, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS ROB_IRR FROM BASE_MAP B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.WAHDKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DASDIV = '2' THEN COALESCE(C.QTY, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS DAS_MID_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DASDIV = '3' THEN COALESCE(C.QTY, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS DAS_SML_QTY FROM TWIF_DAS_PRCSRSLT_WA A JOIN TWIF_DAS_PRCSRSLT_ORDER O ON A.CTKEY = O.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = O.OWKEY AND A.WASEQ = O.WASEQ JOIN TWIF_DAS_PRCSRSLT_IC C ON O.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND O.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND O.WASEQ = C.WASEQ AND O.ORDERSEQ = C.ORDERSEQ WHERE A.IFTYPE = 'R' AND A.IFSTATUS = '90' GROUP BY A.WAHDKEY ) DAS ON B.WAHDKEY = DAS.WAHDKEY LEFT JOIN (SELECT WAHDKEY, SUM(QTY) AS QTY FROM TWIF_ROBDAS_PRCSRSLT_IC GROUP BY WAHDKEY) RI ON B.WAHDKEY = RI.WAHDKEY LEFT JOIN (SELECT WAHDKEY, SUM(QTY) AS QTY FROM TWIF_ROBDAS_PAKCOMPL_IC GROUP BY WAHDKEY) RP ON B.WAHDKEY = RP.WAHDKEY LEFT JOIN (SELECT WAHDKEY, SUM(QTY) AS QTY FROM TWIF_ROBDAS_RSLTXNIS_IC GROUP BY WAHDKEY) RR ON B.WAHDKEY = RR.WAHDKEY GROUP BY B.PIHDKEY ),
-- 5. 피킹 실적 (CELL 기준) PICK_RSLT AS ( SELECT PIHDKEY, COUNT(DISTINCT ICKEY) AS PICK_SKU, COUNT(DISTINCT LCKEY) AS PLAN_CELL, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN CNFRMQTY > 0 THEN LCKEY END) AS CONF_CELL FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_TOT_DT WHERE PIHDKEY IN (SELECT DISTINCT PIHDKEY FROM BASE_MAP) GROUP BY PIHDKEY ),
-- 6. 지표 계산 FINAL_VALS AS ( SELECT PN.INTEGRATED_WAVE, CAST(P.PICK_SKU AS NUMERIC) AS C01, CAST(P.PLAN_CELL AS NUMERIC) AS C02, CAST(O.TOTAL_PCS AS NUMERIC) AS C03, CAST(O.RELEASE_ORD_CNT AS NUMERIC) AS C04, CAST(O.DAS_ORD_CNT AS NUMERIC) AS C05, CAST(O.ROB_ORD_CNT AS NUMERIC) AS C06, CAST(P.CONF_CELL AS NUMERIC) AS C07, CAST(I.DAS_SML AS NUMERIC) AS C08, CAST((I.ROB_IN + I.ROB_IRR) AS NUMERIC) AS C09, CAST(LEAST(100, ROUND(COALESCE(P.CONF_CELL/NULLIF(P.PLAN_CELL,0)*100, 0))) AS NUMERIC) AS P10, CAST(P.CONF_CELL AS NUMERIC) AS V10, CAST(P.PLAN_CELL AS NUMERIC) AS T10, CAST(LEAST(100, ROUND(COALESCE(I.DAS_MID/NULLIF(O.DAS_TARGET_PCS,0)*100, 0))) AS NUMERIC) AS P11, CAST(I.DAS_MID AS NUMERIC) AS V11, CAST(O.DAS_TARGET_PCS AS NUMERIC) AS T11, CAST(LEAST(100, ROUND(COALESCE(I.DAS_SML/NULLIF(O.DAS_TARGET_PCS,0)*100, 0))) AS NUMERIC) AS P12, CAST(I.DAS_SML AS NUMERIC) AS V12, CAST(O.DAS_TARGET_PCS AS NUMERIC) AS T12, CAST(LEAST(100, ROUND(COALESCE(O.TOTAL_PAK_PCS/NULLIF(O.DAS_TARGET_PCS + COALESCE(O.SINGLE_TARGET_PCS, 0),0)*100, 0))) AS NUMERIC) AS P13, CAST(O.TOTAL_PAK_PCS AS NUMERIC) AS V13, CAST(O.DAS_TARGET_PCS + COALESCE(O.SINGLE_TARGET_PCS, 0) AS NUMERIC) AS T13, CAST(LEAST(100, ROUND(COALESCE(I.ROB_IN/NULLIF(O.ROB_TARGET_PCS,0)*100, 0))) AS NUMERIC) AS P14, CAST(I.ROB_IN AS NUMERIC) AS V14, CAST(O.ROB_TARGET_PCS AS NUMERIC) AS T14, CAST(LEAST(100, ROUND(COALESCE(I.ROB_PAK/NULLIF(O.ROB_TARGET_PCS,0)*100, 0))) AS NUMERIC) AS P15, CAST(I.ROB_PAK AS NUMERIC) AS V15, CAST(O.ROB_TARGET_PCS AS NUMERIC) AS T15, CAST(LEAST(100, ROUND(COALESCE(I.ROB_IRR/NULLIF(O.IRR_TARGET_PCS,0)*100, 0))) AS NUMERIC) AS P16, CAST(I.ROB_IRR AS NUMERIC) AS V16, CAST(O.IRR_TARGET_PCS AS NUMERIC) AS T16 FROM PICK_NAMED PN LEFT JOIN ORD_DATA O ON PN.PIHDKEY = O.PIHDKEY LEFT JOIN PICK_RSLT P ON PN.PIHDKEY = P.PIHDKEY LEFT JOIN PERF_IF I ON PN.PIHDKEY = I.PIHDKEY ),
-- 7. UNPIVOT (Oracle UNPIVOT -> LATERAL + VALUES) UNPIVOT_DATA AS ( SELECT F.INTEGRATED_WAVE, v.GRP_NM, v.VAL, v.NUMERATOR, v.DENOMINATOR FROM FINAL_VALS F CROSS JOIN LATERAL ( VALUES ('01. 피킹_SKU', F.C01, F.C01, F.C01), ('02. 피킹_CELL', F.C02, F.C02, F.C02), ('03. 전체_주문_PCS', F.C03, F.C03, F.C03), ('04. [통합] 주문건수', F.C04, F.C04, F.C04), ('05. [DAS] 주문건수', F.C05, F.C05, F.C05), ('06. [로봇] 주문건수', F.C06, F.C06, F.C06), ('07. [통합] 완료건수', F.C07, F.C07, F.C07), ('08. [DAS] 완료건수', F.C08, F.C08, F.C08), ('09. [로봇] 완료건수', F.C09, F.C09, F.C09), ('10. 피킹 진척율 (%)', F.P10, F.V10, F.T10), ('11. [DAS] 중분류 진척율 (%)', F.P11, F.V11, F.T11), ('12. [DAS] 소분류 진척율 (%)', F.P12, F.V12, F.T12), ('13. [DAS] 포장 진척율 (%)', F.P13, F.V13, F.T13), ('14. [로봇] 투입 진척율 (%)', F.P14, F.V14, F.T14), ('15. [로봇] 검수 진척율 (%)', F.P15, F.V15, F.T15), ('16. [로봇] 이형물 진척율 (%)', F.P16, F.V16, F.T16) ) AS v(GRP_NM, VAL, NUMERATOR, DENOMINATOR) )
-- 8. 최종 PIVOT (Oracle PIVOT -> CASE + GROUP BY) 및 가중 평균 SELECT D.GRP_NM, MAX(D.W1) AS W1, MAX(D.W2) AS W2, MAX(D.W3) AS W3, MAX(D.W4) AS W4, MAX(D.W5) AS W5, MAX(D.W6) AS W6, MAX(D.W7) AS W7, MAX(D.W8) AS W8, MAX(D.W9) AS W9, MAX(D.W10) AS W10, MAX(D.W11) AS W11, MAX(D.W12) AS W12, MAX(D.BULK) AS BULK, MAX(D.SINGLE) AS SINGLE, CASE WHEN D.GRP_NM LIKE '%진척율%' THEN LEAST(100, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(D.S_NUM) / NULLIF(SUM(D.S_DEN), 0) * 100, 0))) ELSE (COALESCE(MAX(D.W1), 0)+COALESCE(MAX(D.W2), 0)+COALESCE(MAX(D.W3), 0)+COALESCE(MAX(D.W4), 0)+COALESCE(MAX(D.W5), 0)+ COALESCE(MAX(D.W6), 0)+COALESCE(MAX(D.W7), 0)+COALESCE(MAX(D.W8), 0)+COALESCE(MAX(D.W9), 0)+COALESCE(MAX(D.W10), 0)+ COALESCE(MAX(D.BULK), 0)+COALESCE(MAX(D.SINGLE), 0)) END AS TOTCNT, MAX(T.TOT_WORK_CNT) AS TOTWORKCNT FROM ( SELECT GRP_NM, INTEGRATED_WAVE, VAL, NUMERATOR AS S_NUM, DENOMINATOR AS S_DEN, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 1' THEN VAL END) AS W1, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 2' THEN VAL END) AS W2, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 3' THEN VAL END) AS W3, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 4' THEN VAL END) AS W4, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 5' THEN VAL END) AS W5, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 6' THEN VAL END) AS W6, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 7' THEN VAL END) AS W7, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 8' THEN VAL END) AS W8, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 9' THEN VAL END) AS W9, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 10' THEN VAL END) AS W10, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 11' THEN VAL END) AS W11, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Wave 12' THEN VAL END) AS W12, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Bulk Wave' THEN VAL END) AS BULK, MAX(CASE WHEN INTEGRATED_WAVE = 'Single Wave' THEN VAL END) AS SINGLE FROM UNPIVOT_DATA GROUP BY GRP_NM, INTEGRATED_WAVE, VAL, NUMERATOR, DENOMINATOR ) D CROSS JOIN TOTAL_STATS T GROUP BY D.GRP_NM ORDER BY D.GRP_NM
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (
) DATA ORDER BY DATA.GRP_NM
